### step1: download zip

![](https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/40284411/566164974-e45e4dd5-ce68-4c79-9372-7162931a4dba.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..RtZ-_6Jjx25OS_rIfjv4_4LKVTCFkcVGIbWtFQQWEOU)

### step2:Unzip the file RFIDToolsForThailand-main.zip to the folder RFIDToolsForThailand-main

<img width="822" height="243" alt="2026-03-19-18-06-40-image" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c81f63f4-b94b-4ee6-8943-2c6b6a235d12" />

### step3: Try the standard installation first, and if that doesn't work, try a direct application launch.

<img width="711" height="351" alt="2026-03-19-18-07-04-image" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/1d333253-def8-4a0b-a65e-eeae056dd120" />

### step4: If the program interface appears, it means the program has launched successfully，then switch to the "Bind tags" panel and click open directory button,you can find where is the app is installed.


<img width="1008" height="906" alt="2026-03-19-18-09-30-image" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/9382278f-9c54-4dc3-8674-326ff184aaa9" />


### step5:copy the Data、 x64 and x86 files to the directory of the app.

<img width="1527" height="609" alt="2026-03-19-18-10-23-image" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/d23323f7-1548-4528-8552-8da4efbdc263" />
<img width="788" height="582" alt="2026-03-19-18-10-42-image" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/7dc5212d-ed0e-4f88-bda1-2dce49d1caab" />


### step6: If data appears after clicking the query button, it indicates that the program is running correctly.

<img width="999" height="599" alt="2026-03-19-18-11-59-image" src="https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c31d4c58-8733-48ac-a7a3-b67cfd4467a6" />
